query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_guides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN overview IS NULL OR overview = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_overview,
  SUM(CASE WHEN topThingsToDo IS NULL OR topThingsToDo = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_activities,
  SUM(CASE WHEN quickFacts IS NULL OR quickFacts = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_quickfacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN attractions IS NULL OR attractions = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_attractions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN beachesLocalRules IS NULL OR beachesLocalRules = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_beaches,
  SUM(CASE WHEN foodCafes IS NULL OR foodCafes = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_food,
  SUM(CASE WHEN faq IS NULL OR faq = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_faq,
  SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NULL OR latitude = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_latitude,
  SUM(CASE WHEN longitude IS NULL OR longitude = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_longitude,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bestTimeToVisit IS NULL OR bestTimeToVisit = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_best_time,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency IS NULL OR currency = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_currency,
  SUM(CASE WHEN language IS NULL OR language = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_language
FROM island_guides
